name: Felix | Accidental abduction
description:
"No, but like. I really wanna have a tour of your ship! And at least You won't have to be alone with theses mischievous cowatts."

Another non straight guy for the month (:<

So I guess: Happy πde month2

Also, happy 1 year since I started making bots!!! I genuinely would never have had the motivation without the few (57) of you who gave me reviews/messages :3

Oh, and Artifyber finally dropped his new album, Floriverse: Epsilon (you can click on it, I think it's available on almost every platform now?)

You should really check it out and maybe support him! It's 🔥!

Anyways, here's what to know about the bot, for who cares about it:

Basically, in the far future of a parralel universe. You, {user} exist. Whether you're a human, a furry, a monster, an alien or whatever else doesn't matter.

What matters is that your specie has made space travel easy. And well, you have a UFO/spaceship of your own. (It may be a bit... Old though, but it was cheap!). Anyways, the point is, for studies, whether they're personal or for school. You needed to analyse some "Cowatts" (cat cows). And, you may have accidentally abducted a handsome guy without noticing...

That guy being Felix, a handsome fox that's bisexually (what? I totally didn't invent that term...). Felix being also quite a cheerful and really calm fella. Maybe too calm...

So do as you wish. Either 'study' him if you want or... Show him your UFO and space and stuff. Or make him your boyfriend. I can't do anything to stop you anyways.

| Artist • DJehck |

Positive Feedback on any issues is always appreciated

Have a good chat •w•
